content: @noble/ciphers hsalsa(s,k,i,out) takes Uint32Array args (4=sigma, 8=key, 4=nonce, 8=out); must copy DH bytes to fresh aligned Uint8Array and use u32() from @noble/ciphers/utils before calling. secretbox(key,nonce) returns {seal,open} alias. xsalsa20poly1305(key,nonce) returns {encrypt,decrypt}.

name: nacl-box-with-noble
description: x25519.getSharedSecret + hsalsa(SIGMA, u32(alignedDh), zeros4, out8) + xsalsa20poly1305 replaces tweetnacl box. Both sides must use same format (ciphertext||MAC appended).
